SEARCH
程序包 system

类 Profile

java.lang.Object
system.Profile
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable
public class Profile extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a Teaching Assistant's profile information.

A Profile contains detailed information about a TA including academic details, contact information, CV, self-description, and skills. Each TA has one profile linked to their email address.

The class implements Serializable to support persistence via file storage.

从以下版本开始:
2026
另请参阅:

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Profile(String email, String studentId, String major, String grade, String phone, String cvPath, String description)
    Constructs a new Profile without skills.
    Profile(String email, String studentId, String major, String grade, String phone, String cvPath, String description, List<String> skills)
    Constructs a new Profile with skills.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Profile

      public Profile(String email, String studentId, String major, String grade, String phone, String cvPath, String description)
      Constructs a new Profile without skills.

      Skills list is initialized as empty.

      参数:
      email - the TA's email
      studentId - the student ID
      major - the major/degree
      grade - the academic grade
      phone - the phone number
      cvPath - path to CV file
      description - self-description

    • Profile

      public Profile(String email, String studentId, String major, String grade, String phone, String cvPath, String description, List<String> skills)
      Constructs a new Profile with skills.
      参数:
      email - the TA's email
      studentId - the student ID
      major - the major/degree
      grade - the academic grade
      phone - the phone number
      cvPath - path to CV file
      description - self-description
      skills - list of skills (null-safe)

      public String getEmail()
      Returns the TA's email.

      public String getStudentId()
      Returns the student ID.

      Returns the major.
      返回:

      public String getGrade()
      Returns the academic grade.
      返回:

      public String getPhone()
      Returns the phone number.

      public String getCvPath()
      Returns the CV file path.

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the self-description.

      public List<String> getSkills()
      Returns the list of skills.
      返回:
      the skills list (never null)

    • setMajor

      public void setMajor(String major)
      Sets the major.
      参数:

    • setGrade

      public void setGrade(String grade)
      Sets the academic grade.
      参数:
      grade - the new grade

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Sets the phone number.
      参数:

    • setCvPath

      public void setCvPath(String cvPath)
      Sets the CV file path.
      参数:
      cvPath - the new CV path

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Sets the self-description.
      参数:
      description - the new description

    • setSkills

      public void setSkills(List<String> skills)
      Sets the skills list.
      参数:
      skills - the new skills list (null-safe)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this profile in CSV format.

      Format: email,studentId,major,grade,phone,cvPath,description,skills

      Skills are joined with semicolons as delimiters.

      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      the CSV string representation

    • fromString

      public static Profile fromString(String line)
      Parses a CSV string to create a Profile object.

      Supports lines with 6, 7, or 8 comma-separated fields.

      参数:
      line - the CSV string to parse
      返回:
      the parsed Profile, or null if the line format is invalid
